case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. DALIA QUEZADA RAMIREZ

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-16-2020 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC, REPRESENTED BY SOFIA REYES, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DALIA QUEZADA RAMIREZ IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RAMIREZ, DALIA QUEZADA $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,600.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SOFIA REYES, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $50.00) SERVED FEB-10-2020, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT RAMIREZ, DALIA QUEZADA
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT RAMIREZ, DALIA QUEZADA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-16-2020 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
